attestations.statement: Semantic adequacy review, commit 94d662fe, performed 2026-07-18 against manuscripts/main/A_RANK_FOUR_COUNTEREXAMPLE_TO_GROTHENDIECKS_POWER_QUESTION_2026-07-12.tex (thm:main) and lean/FiniteFlatGroupSchemes/GrothendieckCounterexample.lean. VERIFIED CORRESPONDENCES: base ring R = Z[a,b]/(a^3, b^3, a^2 b + 2) identical to Lean baseIdeal; A = R[U,V]/(U^2 - abU + b^2 V, V^2 - a^2 V) realized by nested QuadraticAlgebra with the same relations; counit(U)=counit(V)=0 and comul U = U(x)1 + lambda(x)U, comul V = V(x)lambda + 1(x)V matching thm:main(3); powerMap n is the n-th convolution power of the identity (universalPoint), the manuscript's n-th power word; powerMap_four_U = 2bW <> 0, powerMap_four_v = 0, powerMap_eight = unit.comp counit matching thm:main(4); antipode = seventh convolution power (instHopfAlgebra); noncommutativity of G expressed as not_isCocomm; the headline `counterexample` (Nontrivial R, Free, Finite, finrank 4, powerMap 4 <> unit.comp counit) expresses 'a finite locally free group scheme of rank four not killed by four', and affineGroupScheme : Grp (CommAlgCat R)op with monPowMap_affineGroupScheme_four_ne supplies the scheme-level reading as a genuine group object via the Hopf/cogroup equivalence. RESIDUALS (auxiliary, not load-bearing for the claim): thm:main(1)'s classification of R as a local Artin complete intersection of length nine with residue field F_2 is not formalized (Lean carries Nontrivial R and 2b <> 0 only); thm:main(5)'s special-fiber identification alpha_2 x alpha_2 is not formalized; the group scheme is a group object in (CommAlgCat R)op rather than a literal Spec construction. None of these weaken the counterexample statement. VERDICT: the Lean statements adequately express the manuscript claim.
